result.summary: Mapped Airwallex’s public integration surface: REST API, Open Banking REST docs, 2 MCP servers (Developer and Docs), and the Airwallex CLI; identified API client credentials plus partner OAuth app credentials and their auth bindings where documented.

api_client_creds.label: Client ID + API key
api_client_creds.setup: Create a sandbox or production API credential in the Airwallex web app: go to [Manage API keys](https://www.airwallex.com/docs/developer-tools/api/manage-api-keys), then in the [Airwallex web app](https://airwallex.com/app/) open **Settings → Developer → API keys** and generate either an admin API key or a scoped API key. Save the generated API key and note the associated Client ID. Use these credentials to obtain an access token for the REST API. Sandbox sign-up is available at [Get started in sandbox](https://demo.airwallex.com/signup/us/sandbox).

partner_oauth_app.label: Partner OAuth client (Client ID + Client Secret)
partner_oauth_app.setup: Request partner application credentials from the Airwallex partner integrations team as described in [Get started](https://www.airwallex.com/docs/developer-tools/partner-connections/get-started): email [partner-integration@airwallex.com](mailto:partner-integration@airwallex.com) to obtain a `client_id` and `client_secret`. Coordinate the redirect URI and approved scopes from the [OAuth scopes](https://www.airwallex.com/docs/developer-tools/partner-connections/oauth-scopes) list before implementing the authorization flow.

variables.name: environment
variables.resolveFrom: Use sandbox `https://api-demo.airwallex.com` or production `https://api.airwallex.com` as documented in Postman quickstart.
variables.description: Airwallex exposes separate sandbox and production REST API base URLs.
